name: Plausible API
description: Plausible is a privacy-friendly, open-source web analytics platform. The API provides programmatic access to website statistics (Stats API) and site management (Sites API). Stats API allows querying aggregate metrics, timeseries data, and breakdowns by various dimensions. Sites API allows creating, updating, and deleting sites, managing shared links, and goals.
